result.finding: runs/pfas-rice-risk-readiness (digest sha256:bdcdacab..4be9d9df): for dietary risk the relevant compartment is brown-rice grain. The lipid mechanism predicts the independent Kim 2019 grain BAF OUT-OF-SAMPLE at log10 RMSE 0.48 (~factor 3), reliable subset 0.20 (~1.6), and the breakthrough closes the long-chain structural coverage -- so the model is usable as a SCREENING-level dietary risk tool. HONEST BOUND: worst-case grain miss PFOS endosperm ~5x (log10 0.70) + GenX over -> congener-specific uncertainty factors (~3x typical, up to ~5x PFSA endosperm/ether), NOT regulatory precision (needs more data: a predictive 2-pool, an ether/sulfonamide QSPR, field-soil HYDRUS).
